name: Yonne (France)
description: In chief two panels: at the hoist, blue strewn with gold fleurs-de-lis within a red-and-white chequered border; at the fly, gold and blue diagonal stripes within a red border. Below, a gold field charged with a blue pall.
history: The two upper panels combine the old arms of France and of Burgundy, the duchy to which the area historically belonged.
